Pyrog..Chill: Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat, or dry heat with marked aching in the limbs; restlessness, > by motion and heat.
Pyrog..Extremities: Cold extremities. Numbness of extremities. Hands and arms numb. Hands cold and clammy.
Pyrog..Generalities: The sore bruised condition is as marked as in Arnica and Baptisia; the aching in the bones like Eupatorium, the restlessness, > by motion and heat like Rhus. Pains all aggravated sitting. Complaints come on from becoming cold, and from cold damp weather.
Pyrog..Genitalia female: Uterine haemorrhage. Putrid, scanty lochia. Suppressed lochia. Violent chill; puerperal fever. Menses lasting one day, then bloody leucorrhea. Septic fever following abortion. Prolapsus of uterus.
Pyrog..Stomach: Vomiting of bile, blood; of putrid masses. Vomits water when it becomes warm in the stomach. Stercoraceous vomiting. Coffee ground vomiting.
Pyrog..Stomach, thirst: Thirst for cold drinks during chill and heat.
Pyrog..Generalities, pain: Aching in bones all over the body. Soreness of the muscles and the bed feels hard, > by motion. Pain in all the limbs with great restlessness.
Pyrog..Clinical: It aborts puerperal fever in a few hours when clearly indicated. She has not been well since a puerperal fever many years ago, is a good reason for thinking of Pyrogen. It has cured Bright's disease that could be traced to septic origin.
Pyrog..Abdomen: Distension and great sensitiveness of abdomen. Rumbling in bowels. Pain on deep breathing.
Pyrog..Heart & Circulation: It is a most useful remedy when there is threatening heart failure in septic and zymotic fevers. Heart failure in septic fevers, < by least motion. Every pulsation felt in distant parts. Anxiety and sinking sensation in region of heart. Distinct consciousness of the heart.
Pyrog..Generalities, heat: These features are found in hectic fevers in the last stages of phthisis, as well as septic fevers. When the temperature reaches 106 and there is great soreness and aching this remedy will make great changes in a single day.
Pyrog..Extremities, pain: Pain in all the limbs with great restlessness. Aching in bones all over the body. Soreness of the muscles and the bed feels hard, > by motion.
Pyrog..Extremities, pain, lower limbs: Pain in the knees and legs during chill and fever, ameliorated from walking, and from heat. Aching in legs while sitting, > by walking.
Pyrog..Clinical, colic: Cutting, colicky pain. Pain in right side going through to the back < on every motion, talking and breathing; > by lying on right side; groaning with every breath.
Pyrog..Abdomen, inflammation: Inflammation of peritoneum, intestines and uterus, of septic origin.
Pyrog..Extremities, pain, leg: Pain in the knees and legs during chill and fever, ameliorated from walking, and from heat. Aching in legs while sitting, > by walking. Aching above knee as if bone were broken, > by stretching of limbs and motion.
Pyrog..Fever: The potencies prepared from Heath's 3d of decomposed beef have been used by the author for many years against all forms of septic fever and sequelae, when the symptoms agree. Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat, or dry heat with marked aching in the limbs; restlessness, > by motion and heat.
Pyrog..Fever, septic fever: It will often save life in the most dangerous and rapid septic fevers. Fevers from sewer gas poisoning; erysipelas from infection and surgical fevers.
Pyrog..Stomach, thirst, extreme: Thirst for cold drinks during chill and heat.
Pyrog..Clinical, inflammation: Inflammation of peritoneum, intestines and uterus, of septic origin. Great pain when the flow from an open abscess becomes scanty. Violent burning in an abscess (Ars., Anthr., Tarent. cubensis).
Pyrog..Heart & Circulation, pulse: When the pulse is extremely high, and the temperature not correspondingly high this remedy will be useful. On the other hand, when the pulse and temperature are out of rhythm either way this remedy should be considered if the case is of septic origin. Rapid irregular fluttering pulse.
Pyrog..Chill, evening: The chill is quotidian; it comes in the evening, generally at 7 P.M. The periodicity is regular.
Pyrog..Chill, shaking, evening: Violent chill; puerperal fever. The chill is quotidian; it comes in the evening, generally at 7 P.M.
Pyrog..Chill, shaking, shivering, rigors: Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat. Violent chill; puerperal fever.
Pyrog..Extremities, pain, aching: Aching in legs while sitting, > by walking. Aching above knee as if bone were broken, > by stretching of limbs and motion.
Pyrog..Extremities, pain, thigh: Pain in the thighs during chill and fever.
Pyrog..Fever, external heat: Hot sweat with high temperature. Cheeks red and burning hot.
Pyrog..Fever, external heat, chilliness, with: Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat, or dry heat with marked aching in the limbs.
Pyrog..Fever, intense heat: When the temperature reaches 106 and there is great soreness and aching this remedy will make great changes in a single day; but if the pains are > by motion and heat it will abort the fever.
